root_cause.headline: Lactate redraw orders not auto-fired on shift change for ER-admitted patients between 07:00 and 08:00
root_cause.detail: 11 of 14 cardiology bundle fallouts share a single signature: the 3-hour lactate redraw was not ordered for ER-admitted patients whose initial lactate was drawn between 06:45 and 07:45 CST. The order auto-fire rule that triggers the redraw is suppressed during the nursing handoff window (07:00–08:00) in the Cardiology ER pod. Floor-admitted patients on the same service line show 100% compliance — isolating the gap to the admission-source dimension.
root_cause.affected_cohort: ER-admitted cardiology patients with initial lactate drawn 06:45–07:45 CST

without_wizard.label: Without dbt-wizard
without_wizard.summary: Question enters the analytics backlog. Quality Committee meets without the answer.
narrative: CMO files the request. It enters the analytics backlog at priority B.
Data engineer scopes the work Monday morning — four days after the committee.
Engineer writes SQL from scratch, joining four gold marts by hand.
Tests, YAML, and contract get bolted on at PR time. Sometimes.
Quality team cannot isolate root cause before the committee meeting.
NHSN submission carries a note: data pending.

with_wizard.label: With dbt-wizard
with_wizard.summary: Four sub-agents surface the upstreams, author the SQL, write the tests, and materialize the asset in 87 seconds.
narrative: Explorer runs status and search. Returns the four gold upstream candidates.
Summary runs describe and lineage. Confirms join path and names the new grain.
Worker runs dbt_show on a 7-day slice. Validates the proposed grain.
Worker authors fct_sepsis_bundle_by_service_line_daily.sql with CTEs and final SELECT.
Verification writes the YAML — description, schema contract, 8 tests, ownership.
Worker materializes the table to Iceberg. Verification confirms downstream lineage.
CMO presents root-cause finding to Quality Committee 14 hours ahead of schedule.

hero.label: Root cause identified 14 hours before the Quality Committee meets
hero.note: From CMO question to materialized Iceberg gold table — versioned, tested, documented, lineage-tracked. The cardiology team now knows the shift-change order-fire suppression is the gap. The fix is a configuration change, not a care failure.
